content.body:
- Fix getCoreDir() to use saved config (~/.claude/.copilot-core-path)
  instead of relative __dirname which breaks after build/npm link
- Remove --dts from build (CLI doesn't need type declarations)
- Add install.sh for one-command setup (npm install + build + link)
- init now auto-runs setup before onboarding (no separate step needed)
- Skip unknown manager types in writeManagerFiles (fixes crash with
  legacy "dev" managers)
- Extract runSetup() as reusable function with silent mode
- Update README to reflect simplified 2-step flow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: fix(cli): resolve core path dynamically + merge setup into init
